metadata.name: space_core
metadata.description: Core prediction market program for Space

instructions.name: add_market_outcome
docs: Add a new outcome to an existing market (per-outcome NO model only)
Space for up to 10 outcomes is pre-allocated in the Market account
remaining_accounts: [yes_mint, no_mint, creator, token_program, system_program]

accounts.name: no_mint
docs: NO mint: validated in instruction body (per-outcome PDA or shared)

accounts.name: position
docs: Position account (required for leveraged close orders to restore shares/collateral/debt)

accounts.name: position
docs: Position account (required for leveraged close orders to restore shares/collateral/debt)

instructions.name: close_leveraged_position
docs: Close a leveraged position by placing a market sell order.
This properly sells shares on the market instead of burning them,
maintaining proper invariants and ensuring debt is repaid from actual sale proceeds.
Flow:
1. Create a sell order for the user's leveraged shares at market price
2. Escrow the shares (transfer to share_escrow)
3. Mark order as leveraged_close with debt info
4. When order is matched/filled, execute_seller_match will:
- Repay borrowed_amount to liquidity_vault from sale proceeds
- Return remaining proceeds (profit/loss) to user
- Update position accordingly

accounts.name: pending_order
docs: The sell order to be created for this leveraged close

accounts.name: user_share_account
docs: User's token account for the shares being sold (YES or NO based on outcome_id)

accounts.name: share_escrow_authority
docs: Share escrow authority PDA

accounts.name: share_escrow
docs: Share escrow for the shares being sold

accounts.name: share_mint
docs: The mint for the shares being sold

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Close a position (for finalized markets or non-leveraged positions only).
For active markets with leverage, use close_leveraged_position instead.

instructions.name: convert_shares
docs: Convert NO shares to YES shares of a target outcome (1:1).
Per Space docs: NO shares are fungible across outcomes.
Burning NO is equivalent to gaining YES exposure on a different outcome.

accounts.name: no_mint
docs: NO mint: validated in instruction body

accounts.name: market
docs: fields (quote_mint, quote_decimals, version) before any Anchor-level
deserialization attempts to read them from out-of-bounds bytes on a
pre-v2 allocation. Market discriminator is validated by
Market::try_deserialize inside the handler.

accounts.name: quote_mint
docs: Quote mint to record on the migrated market. Caller must pass the mint
that matches the token the market's vaults were actually created with;
a mismatch will cause subsequent token transfers to fail at runtime.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Either the market's `creator` or `config.admin`; verified in handler
after the market struct is deserialized.

accounts.name: no_mint
docs: NO mint: for new markets (per-outcome NO) validated in instruction body via PDA;
for old markets validated against market.no_mint

accounts.name: no_mint
docs: NO mint: validated in instruction body (per-outcome PDA or shared)

accounts.name: user_position
docs: The account will be manually verified in the instruction

accounts.name: user_position
docs: Can be either spot (position_type=0) or leveraged (position_type=1) position
Seeds constraint removed to allow frontend to pass the correct PDA based on which position exists
The account will be manually verified in the instruction

instructions.name: redeem_shares
docs: Redeem winning shares after market finalization

accounts.name: no_mint
docs: NO mint: validated in instruction body (per-outcome PDA or shared)

errors.name: ActiveLeveragedPositionExists
errors.msg: Active leveraged position exists - must settle position first

errors.name: InvalidSpotDebt
errors.msg: Invalid spot debt (spot positions must have 0 debt)

errors.name: CannotSellLeveragedAsSpot
errors.msg: Cannot sell leveraged position as spot

errors.name: CannotCloseSpotAsLeveraged
errors.msg: Cannot close spot position as leveraged
